articles.title: Top counterterrorism official resigns over Trump’s Iran war
articles.description:
“Iran posed no imminent threat to our nation, and it is clear that we started this war due to pressure from Israel and its powerful American lobby.”

The post Top counterterrorism official resigns over Trump’s Iran war appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Top counterterrorism official resigns amid concerns over Trump's Iran war decisions.
Official cites lack of imminent threat from Iran and external pressures influencing U.S. policy.
Resignation may impact Boston's national security strategies and local counterterrorism efforts.

articles.title: Police seek Mass. vehicle after driver involved in fatal Providence hit-and-run
articles.description:
Authorities are looking for a black Chevrolet Equinox with alloy wheels and a Massachusetts license plate.

The post Police seek Mass. vehicle after driver involved in fatal Providence hit-and-run appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Authorities are searching for a black Chevrolet Equinox involved in a fatal hit-and-run.
The vehicle has Massachusetts license plates and alloy wheels.
Boston residents should be vigilant as the driver remains at large.

articles.title: Martha Stewart’s The Bedford is now open at this New England resort
articles.description:
The Bedford is styled after Martha Stewart's sprawling farmhouse estate in New York, and the menu includes some of the homemaking mogul's favorite recipes.

The post Martha Stewart’s The Bedford is now open at this New England resort appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: The Bedford restaurant opened at a New England resort, inspired by Martha Stewart's farmhouse.
Menu features Martha Stewart's favorite recipes, enhancing local dining options for Boston residents.
The opening boosts tourism and local economy, attracting visitors to the New England area.

articles.title: Weekend commuter rail disruption will now leak into Fridays
articles.description:
Regular service will run during the Boston Marathon weekend, according to the MBTA. 

The post Weekend commuter rail disruption will now leak into Fridays appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: MBTA announces weekend commuter rail disruptions will now affect Fridays.
Service changes coincide with the Boston Marathon weekend on April 15-16.
Boston residents should prepare for altered travel plans and potential delays.

articles.title: This Massachusetts commute ranks as the most stressful, poll finds
articles.description:
A new poll ranked the state’s top three most frustrating drives. Do you agree?

The post This Massachusetts commute ranks as the most stressful, poll finds appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Poll identifies Boston as having the most stressful commute in Massachusetts.
Top three frustrating drives include routes with significant traffic congestion.
Increased commute stress may affect local residents' mental health and productivity.

articles.title: Trump sold young voters on his vision. Many are having buyer’s remorse.
articles.description:
"We’re like, ‘How the f— does this benefit me? I can’t afford to pay for college. I can’t buy a home.'"

The post Trump sold young voters on his vision. Many are having buyer’s remorse. appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Young Boston voters express regret over Trump's policies affecting college affordability.
Many report feeling financially burdened, unable to buy homes or pay for education.
Local youth engagement in politics may shift as dissatisfaction grows among this demographic.

articles.title: Jaylen Brown describes ‘surreal’ experience at his first St. Patrick’s Day parade in South Boston
articles.description:
"It was cold, and it was early, and it felt like the whole city was drunk."

The post Jaylen Brown describes ‘surreal’ experience at his first St. Patrick’s Day parade in South Boston appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Jaylen Brown attended his first St. Patrick's Day parade in South Boston on March 17.
He described the atmosphere as 'cold' and 'surreal' with a lively crowd.
Brown's participation highlights the Celtics' connection to local traditions and community events.
